required_skills: Operations Management Fundamentals and Business Process Understanding
preferred_skills: Lean Six Sigma Green Belt Knowledge
Supply Chain and Logistics Operations Exposure
Leadership Development and Team Management Potential
responsibilities: Analyze operational data and business performance metrics to identify process improvement opportunities and support management decision-making.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on operational projects that improve efficiency, productivity, and customer service outcomes.
Develop performance reports and dashboards that provide visibility into operational KPIs and business process effectiveness.
Support process improvement initiatives by documenting workflows, identifying bottlenecks, and recommending operational enhancements.
Participate in rotational assignments across operations, supply chain, logistics, and business functions to build organizational knowledge.
Assist managers in resource planning, project coordination, and execution of strategic operational initiatives and priorities.
Conduct business analyses and present findings to stakeholders through structured reports, presentations, and operational reviews.
Implement assigned improvement projects while developing leadership, analytical, and operational management competencies.
